text: An alert has flagged voltage imbalance on T-002. Pull the relevant sensor readings, look up which failure modes correlate with that symptom in the catalogue, and if the evidence supports a corrective action, open a work order capturing the finding.
characteristic_form: The answer should report a recent voltage sample for T-002, list the matching failure modes from the catalogue, state whether a corrective action is warranted, and include the work order identifier if one is opened.

must_include: work order identifier or no-action justification
